title: Inventory Dashboard Display
description: The system shall display a dashboard that shows current stock levels, expiring units, and pending requests.
rationale: To enable inventory managers to monitor inventory health, prioritize actions to reduce waste, and respond to urgent needs effectively.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency by providing real-time insights into inventory status, reducing errors, and optimizing resource allocation.

source.description: As a inventory manager I need a dashboard that shows current stock levels, expiring units, and pending requests So that I can monitor inventory health, prioritize actions to reduce waste, and respond to urgent needs

acceptance_criteria: I see current stock levels for each item
I see a list of units approaching expiration
I see a count of pending requests
postconditions: The user can view the summary section on the inventory dashboard
edge_cases: What happens if there are no items in stock?
How does the system handle a large number of pending requests?
What if the expiration date for an item is not set?

interfaces.name: Inventory API
interfaces.description: The system will use this API to fetch current stock levels.

interfaces.name: Request API
interfaces.description: This API will provide the count of pending requests.

interfaces.name: Inventory Dashboard
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with this user interface to display the data.

test_cases.description: Verify the dashboard displays current stock levels for each item.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should list all items with their corresponding stock levels.

test_cases.description: Test the display of units approaching expiration.
test_cases.expected_result: A list of items nearing their expiration date should be shown on the dashboard.

test_cases.description: Check if the system correctly shows the count of pending requests.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard should display the total number of outstanding requests.
